title: triticum sativum
intro: Triticum sativum, also known as common wheat or bread wheat, is a domesticated plant species in the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Triticum sativum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, due to its high fiber and antioxidant content. The health benefits of consuming Triticum sativum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease, and providing essential nutrients such as iron, zinc, and B vitamins. Herbal preparations of Triticum sativum include flour made from its grains, which can be used to make bread, pasta, and other baked goods, as well as supplements and teas in traditional medicine.
